seoTitle: Build & Setup a Custom Email Template in HubSpot
metaDescription: Design a HubSpot marketing email template from scratch with the drag-and-drop editor, personalization tokens, branding, and responsive previews.
intro: Setting up a custom email template in HubSpot means choosing a starting layout, then customizing it with your branding and personalization before it's ready for campaigns. This guide covers navigating to the Email dashboard, arranging content blocks in the drag-and-drop editor, and adjusting global style settings. It ends with previewing your work across devices and saving it for reuse.

steps.heading: Open the Email dashboard
steps.body: Go to Marketing in HubSpot and click into the Email directory.

steps.heading: Start a new template
steps.body: Click Create Email and choose the drag-and-drop layout canvas.

steps.heading: Pick a starting theme
steps.body: Browse the theme rows and select a clean baseline template to build from.

steps.heading: Arrange your content blocks
steps.body: Drag text blocks, spacers, and media elements into the canvas from the sidebar.

steps.heading: Personalize and brand it
steps.body: Inject contact personalization tokens and set your font hierarchy and brand colors.

steps.heading: Preview and save
steps.body: Check mobile and desktop previews, then save the template to your master library.

faq.question: Can I start an email template completely from scratch?
faq.answer: Yes, the drag-and-drop layout canvas lets you build a template without starting from a preset theme.

faq.question: How do I add personalized fields to my email?
faq.answer: Highlight text in the editor and use the personalization token option to insert contact or company data.

faq.question: Where are saved templates stored?
faq.answer: Completed templates are saved to your master library so they're reusable across future campaigns.

faq.question: Should I check how my template looks on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes, reviewing the mobile versus desktop preview helps catch layout issues before sending.
